description: Mock NASA Earth Systems layer registry — sample data for prototype. Replace with ingested Earthdata snapshots in production.

layers.name: Vegetation
layers.description: Harmonized Landsat/Sentinel-2 surface reflectance and NDVI — land cover and vegetation health.
layers.citation: NASA LP DAAC — Harmonized Landsat Sentinel-2 (HLS) v2.0

layers.name: Fire & Wildfire
layers.description: FIRMS active fire detections and burn scar context from MODIS/VIIRS.
layers.citation: NASA FIRMS — Fire Information for Resource Management System

layers.name: Water & Wetlands
layers.description: Surface water extent, wetland indicators, and precipitation context.

layers.name: Forest Structure
layers.description: GEDI lidar canopy height, cover, and vertical forest structure.
layers.citation: NASA GEDI — Global Ecosystem Dynamics Investigation

layers.name: Ocean Life
layers.description: Ocean Color chlorophyll, productivity blooms, and PACE-era marine biology context.

layers.name: Heat & Drought
layers.description: ECOSTRESS plant water stress, land surface temperature, and drought indicators.
layers.citation: NASA ECOSTRESS — ECOsystem Spaceborne Thermal Radiometer Experiment

layers.name: Natural Events
layers.description: EONET natural event metadata — storms, eruptions, dust, ice, and ecological events.
layers.citation: NASA EONET — Earth Observatory Natural Event Tracker

layers.name: Climate
layers.description: NASA POWER meteorological and solar climate parameters for field planning.
layers.citation: NASA POWER — Prediction Of Worldwide Energy Resources
